ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( NOT( OR( $Profile.Name = 'System Administrator', $Profile.Name = 'FL Development Administrator AV', $Profile.Name = 'FL Customer Community Login User' ) ), OR( AND( ISCHANGED( MailingAddress ), Account.Donor_Caseload_Lookup__c != Null, $User.Id != Account.OwnerId ), AND( ISCHANGED( OtherAddress ), Account.Donor_Caseload_Lookup__c != Null, $User.Id != Account.OwnerId ), AND( ISCHANGED( MobilePhone ), Account.Donor_Caseload_Lookup__c != Null, $User.Id != Account.OwnerId ) ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: You cannot Edit Addresses or Phone Numbers on this Contact, because it is on a Donor Caseload. Contact the Caseload Owner to make these changes..
